title: Recurring Access to a Form

posts.author: reclaim (Susie )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys,
My Sales Reps were going to use Forms as a quick spot to do the data entry for new leads when on the road - they will not open Monday itself for this but use a link to the form.
How do I make the form accessible in a recurring fashion without them having to “find” the email with a link each time? Thanks!
